news.headline: CZ Zhao believes Bitcoin will evolve into 'money' with utility; shift from speculative to practical asset. Resonates with $100K milestones attitude.
news.summary: Changpeng Zhao, the founder of the largest cryptocurrency exchange, Binance, stated on Monday that Bitcoin is poised to evolve from a speculative investment to a utility asset within the next ten years. Speaking at the Bitcoin MENA Conference in Abu Dhabi, Zhao, also known as CZ, asserted that public perception of the cryptocurrency would shift from focusing on its price and reaching $100,000 milestones to recognizing its practical applications. He emphasized Bitcoin's potential as the future of money, suggesting it be viewed as a utility rather than just an investment asset, eventually becoming synonymous with the concept of money itself. Zhao predicted that as more nation-states incorporate Bitcoin into their reserves, the asset's value would logically increase.

news.headline: Air Liquide receives €110M EU support for green hydrogen
BW LPG has received 2 new vessels from Avance Gas, making a total of 9 out of 12 VLGCs delivered. 3,450,000 new shares issued.
news.summary: Singapore - In an announcement made on August 15, 2024, BW LPG Limited has finalized the acquisition of 12 modern Very Large Gas Carriers (VLGCs) from Avance Gas Holdings Ltd. The vessels BW Mistral and BW Polaris were delivered on December 10, 2024, with a total of nine VLGCs now in their possession. To facilitate this acquisition, BW LPG has issued 3,450,000 new shares. The stock exchange ticker codes are "AGAS" for Avance Gas and "BWLPG.OL" on the Oslo Stock Exchange, with a corresponding one on the NYSE under "BWLP".

news.headline: KuCoin lists Ponchiqs (PONCH) on Spot platform, enhancing blockchain entertainment in Meta-Universe.
news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles, on December 10, 2024, KuCoin, a prominent international cryptocurrency exchange, excitedly revealed the inclusion of Ponchiqs (PONCH) on its Spot trading platform. This move signifies a notable advancement in linking users to pioneering blockchain initiatives that are influencing the future.

news.headline: December is the peak month for home fires in the US. NFPA gives tips to prevent them. (Char count: 75)
news.summary: In the United States, December stands out as the primary month for home fires. The National Fire Protection Association provides insights into the multiple risks associated with this time of year and offers guidance on avoiding such incidents. As of December 10, 2024, in Quincy, Massachusetts, these precautions include reducing hazards related to Christmas trees, holiday decorations, and other factors contributing to home fires. Through sharing statistics and prevention tips, the organization aims to raise awareness and promote safety during the holiday season.

news.headline: ROCKWOOL to invest over 100 MUSD in new Mississippi production line for industrial insulation to meet Gulf region demand.
news.summary: In Hedehusene, Denmark on December 10, 2024, the Board of Directors at ROCKWOOL has given the green light to an investment exceeding 100 million USD in a fresh production line in Mississippi. This venture is focused on manufacturing industrial insulation products and aims to address the increasing needs of the process industry within the Gulf of Mexico area.

news.headline: Euronext reveals November 2024 trading data; significant numbers reported.
Influencer Abdu Rozik emphasizes importance of good intentions for success in crypto, shared insights at Bitcoin MENA in Abu Dhabi.
news.summary: During the Bitcoin MENA event in Abu Dhabi, Abdu Rozik emphasized the importance of celebrities having positive intentions when getting involved in the crypto space.

news.headline: Hexagon appoints new EVP and President of Geosystems division. Thomas Harring moves to EVP, Henning Sandfort becomes President from Feb 1, 2025.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Thomas Harring, who is the President of Hexagon's Geosystems division, was announced to become the Executive Vice President (EVP) of Hexagon. At the same time, Henning Sandfort will take over as the new President of Hexagon's Geosystems division. These transitions are scheduled to occur on February 1, 2025. The current President of Hexagon's Geosystems division, Thomas Harring, will assume the role of EVP within Hexagon, while Henning Sandfort will step into the position of division President. The changes signify a shift in leadership within the company, with significant impact expected in the geospatial technology sector.

news.headline: Recommended public tender offer for Spar Nord Bank A/S corrected; Nykredit RealKredit A/S is in play.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that a total of 1,500 new COVID-19 cases have been recorded in the past week, bringing the overall number of confirmed cases in the region to 15,000. Additionally, there have been 25 new fatalities reported, with the death toll rising to 300. The data suggests a concerning increase in the spread of the virus, prompting authorities to enforce stricter regulations to curb its transmission. Public health officials advise the community to adhere to safety protocols such as wearing masks, practicing social distancing, and getting vaccinated to mitigate the impact of the pandemic. The rising numbers underscore the importance of collective efforts to combat the ongoing health crisis.

news.headline: Bitfarms will revise financials for 2022, 2023 over misclassification of digital asset sale funds after SEC review.
news.summary: Bitfarms Ltd. has announced that it will be restating its financial statements for the years 2022 and 2023 due to the discovery of a significant error in how digital asset sale proceeds were classified. This error has necessitated a thorough review of the company's financial records, leading to the decision to revise the previously reported numbers. The restated financial statements will provide corrected figures for stakeholders to ensure accuracy and transparency in the company's financial reporting.

news.headline: RIOT Platforms unveils $525M convertible notes issue to fund Bitcoin buys and corporate plans.
news.summary: Riot Platforms has revealed plans to raise $525 million through the issuance of 0.75% convertible senior notes maturing in 2030. The primary objectives behind this offering are to enhance their acquisitions of Bitcoin and to cater to general corporate requirements.

news.headline: UMC reduces 2.64 million tons of carbon with suppliers, award event for 16 reducing emissions.
news.summary: In Hsinchu, Taiwan, United Microelectronics Corporation (UMC), a prominent semiconductor foundry, recently hosted the Low-Carbon Supply Chain Awards Ceremony to honor 16 suppliers for their efforts in cutting down greenhouse gas emissions. UMC initiated the Supply Chain Greenhouse Gas Inventory Initiative in 2022 to assist suppliers in tracking and minimizing their emissions. Subsequently, suppliers worldwide affiliated with UMC have made noteworthy progress in this regard. The initiative underscores UMC's commitment to sustainability and fostering environmentally responsible practices within its supply chain.

news.headline: Kenya's growth forecast downgraded due to floods and protests, impacting economy heavily.
SKAN Research Trust in India, led by Ashok Soota, receives two major government recognitions for scientific research.
news.summary: SKAN Research Trust (SKAN), based in Bengaluru, India, and founded by entrepreneur Ashok Soota, recently received two significant accolades from the Government of India. The organization has been officially recognized as a Research Association for Scientific Research under Section 35(1)(ii). This recognition highlights the commitment of SKAN to advancing research and innovation in the region.

news.headline: China's SUNAC China Holdings project helped solve property crisis with ambitious residential project near Shanghai's Bund in 2019.Sources:1News Agency:PRNewswire2Location:Shanghai3Year:20194Company:SUNAC China Holdings5Project:residential property6Distance:10-minute drive from the Bund.
news.summary: Shanghai witnessed a remarkable journey of crisis, recovery, and success as detailed in a report by ShangHaiEye.cn. In 2019, SUNAC China Holdings made a significant impact in Shanghai with an ambitious residential property project located just a 10-minute drive from the Bund. The initial phase of the project showcased a blend of determination and vision, setting the stage for what was to come.

news.headline: Nykredit makes all-cash voluntary bid for Spar Nord Bank.
ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. reported unaudited consolidated net revenues of NT$52,933 million for November 2024, a 6.2% decrease from October and a 2.9% decrease from November 2023.
news.summary: Taipei, December 10, 2024 - ASE Technology Holding Co., Ltd. (NYSE: ASX, IEX: 3711, "ASEH" or the "Company") has released its unaudited consolidated net revenues for November 2024. The consolidated net revenues for November 2024 were NT$52,933 million, showing a 6.2% decrease from October 2024 which recorded NT$56,426 million. In comparison to November 2023, which had NT$54,509 million in net revenues, there was a 2.9% decrease. In terms of US dollars, the net revenues for November 2024 were US$1,848 million. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: China's 10-year yield continues to fall, decreasing by 7bps to a new record low of 1.84%.
LVMH and Integrated Biosciences team up to develop anti-aging products through AI, with a multi-year partnership.
news.summary: In Redwood City, California, LVMH RECHERCHE and Integrated Biosciences have teamed up for a strategic research collaboration focused on developing innovative chemical compounds that combat aging at a molecular level. This partnership will utilize Integrated Biosciences’ advanced synthetic biology and AI technology to create scientifically supported skincare products aimed at maintaining skin's youth and beauty. The collaboration, spanning multiple years, capitalizes on Integrated Biosciences' AI and optogenetics platforms to achieve this goal.

news.headline: Aspo Plc lowers 2024 guidance due to weak demand; profits impacted.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Aspo Plc made an announcement regarding inside information at 9:00 am. A profit warning was issued as the company revised its guidance for 2024 downwards. This decision was influenced by a dip in demand below initial projections. After reviewing preliminary November figures and the most recent financial forecasts, Aspo Plc concluded that the outlook for the full-year 2024 needed adjustment. The primary factor contributing to this revision was the underperformance of ESL Shipping and Telko in the fourth quarter.

news.headline: Funbound Co., Ltd. introduces KONJAKUSO luxury rentals on Homes & Villas by Marriott Bonvoy in Japan. Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Yasu and Osaka, Japan, on December 10, 2024, Funbound Co., Ltd. revealed plans to offer some of its renovated vacant properties as high-end private lodgings through the KONJAKUSO brand. These select rental properties are now accessible on Homes & Villas by the company.

news.headline: West Fraser saves over $266,000 on energy bill with medium-voltage drive technology, meeting carbon goals. By Rockwell Automation.
news.summary: A wood-product company in Milton Keynes, England is making significant progress towards meeting challenging carbon-reduction goals. With the help of Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK), a global leader in industrial automation, the company has achieved enhanced operator insights and improved asset resilience. This development comes as the company aims to reduce its carbon footprint and enhance sustainability in its operations. The initiatives have been instrumental in driving efficiency and promoting environmentally-friendly practices within the wood-product sector.

news.headline: ECOM partners with Sourcemap for EUDR compliance to meet EU Deforestation Regulation, enhancing data tracking.
news.summary: In a recent development in Paris on December 10, 2024, ECOM Agroindustrial Corp Ltd., a prominent trader of agricultural commodities globally, has announced a collaboration with Sourcemap, a renowned supply chain mapping company. This partnership aims to ensure adherence to the EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR), which mandates a higher level of data accuracy. The EUDR necessitates enhanced transparency in supply chains to combat deforestation, making it crucial for companies to align with its regulations efficiently. This strategic alliance between ECOM Agroindustrial Corp Ltd. and Sourcemap underscores a proactive approach in meeting the compliance standards set forth by the EUDR.

news.headline: INVL Baltic Sea Growth Fund acquires Pehart Group, a Romanian paper producer with a 187-year tradition.
news.summary: The prominent private equity firm, INVL Baltic Sea Growth Fund, has recently finalized a deal to purchase stakes in Pehart Group. Pehart Group is a top manufacturer of household and industrial paper goods in Romania and possesses the country's most ancient paper mill, which boasts a remarkable 187-year legacy.

news.headline: Purchasing FSRU Independence saved EUR 8 million through currency hedging, resulted in total cost of EUR 138.04 mil.
news.summary: KN Energies AB, also known as KN, recently executed a significant currency hedging deal in Lithuania by securing the exchange rate when acquiring the FSRU Independence. This move resulted in savings of EUR 8.05 million compared to the rate on the transaction day. With the current USD to EUR exchange rate, the cost of the FSRU vessel would have exceeded EUR 146 million, yet KN only paid EUR 138.04 million, showcasing successful financial management by the Company.

news.headline: Doodle launches public tender offer for Lexibook, valid until December 11, 2024. Take note!
ASM nominates current CFO, 2 Supervisory Board members, and Chair for reappointment.
Equinor ASA (EQNR) announces fourth tranche of 2024 share buy-back program.
news.summary: Below are the details of transactions conducted as part of Equinor ASA's fourth tranche of the 2024 share buy-back program. The program involved purchases of shares listed under various stock exchanges such as OSE, NYSE, CEUX, and TQEX. These transactions signify Equinor ASA's efforts to buy back its own shares in the market.

news.headline: AS PRFoods proposes adopting shareholders' resolutions without meeting due to Commercial Code regulation §2991.
news.summary: AS PRFoods, a company with registration code 11560713 and headquartered at Pärnu mnt 141, Tallinn 11314, has suggested to its shareholders the adoption of resolutions without holding a meeting as per § 2991 of the Commercial Code. The proposed agreements aim to streamline decision-making processes within the company. The proposal is set to eliminate the need for a physical gathering of shareholders, enhancing efficiency. This initiative could potentially lead to faster implementation of important decisions.

news.headline: Update on the share repurchase plan, showing significant progress with a total of X shares bought back as of today.
Voluntary public tender offer for Spar Nord Bank A/S announced by Nykredit Realkredit A/S.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that over 10,000 new COVID-19 cases have been confirmed in the country, bringing the total number of cases to more than 200,000. Additionally, the death toll has surpassed 4,000, with over 500 fatalities reported in the last 24 hours alone. The government has implemented stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including the enforcement of mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and the imposition of fines for non-compliance. Hospitals are reportedly overwhelmed, with over 80% of ICU beds currently occupied. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help mitigate the crisis.

news.headline: Arco Vara issues 4 million euro bonds in recent offering.
news.summary: Arco Vara AS recently completed a bond issuance, with bonds totaling 4,000,000 euros being issued as a result.
